introSection: Wilde Maus was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster located at Holiday Park in Hassloch, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. It operated from 1971 to 1978, when it burnt down.
fullText: Wilde Maus was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster located at Holiday Park in Hassloch, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. It operated from 1971 to 1978, when it burnt down.
